utterance:
"People we used to talk to for hours without end, not even noticing if it became night or dawn...
People who held their phones just for a single word from us...
Back then, we never forgot to share even the tiniest details of our day, and 'silence' was something we never knew.
But as time passed, the talking slowly faded.
The word 'Busy' created a distance between us.
The 'us' we used to be became strange even to ourselves.
Finally, we who talked endlessly have become two strange people who don't even know how to send a single message to each other.
But only one thing comes to mind...
People eventually learn how to take someone who was once their whole life, turn them into just a memory, and then simply forget them...!рҹ’ң"
